info.title: Tourism Marketplace API
info.description: Backend connecting tourists with travel companies.

post.summary: Register a new tourist or company account

get.summary: Verify email address using the token sent on registration

post.summary: Send a password-reset link to the provided email address
Reset password using a valid reset token
Login with email and password — returns a bearer access token

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile

put.summary: Update the authenticated user's profile (first_name, last_name)

post.summary: Upload or replace the authenticated user's profile picture
Create a company profile for the authenticated company-role user

get.summary: List all countries with their active program count

schema.title: Response List Countries Api Countries Get

get.summary: Get a single country by ID with its active program count
List active programs for a specific country

schema.title: Response Get Country Programs Api Countries  Country Id  Programs Get

get.summary: Search and list active travel programs

schema.title: Response List Programs Api Programs Get

post.summary: Create a new travel program (company accounts only)

get.summary: Get full details of a program (pass token to get personalized is_favorited)

put.summary: Update a program — company owner or admin only

delete.summary: Delete a program — company owner or admin only

post.summary: Upload or replace the main cover image of a program
Add an image to the program gallery

delete.summary: Remove an image from the program gallery

get.summary: Search and list company profiles

schema.title: Response List Companies Api Companies Get

get.summary: Get the authenticated company user's own company profile

put.summary: Update the authenticated company user's company profile

post.summary: Upload or replace the company logo / banner image

get.summary: List active programs for a specific company

schema.title: Response Get Company Programs Api Companies  Company Id  Programs Get

get.summary: Get a public company profile by ID
Get the authenticated user's saved / favourite programs

schema.title: Response Get My Favorites Api Favorites Get

post.summary: Save a program to the authenticated user's favourites

delete.summary: Remove a program from the authenticated user's favourites

get.summary: List all reviews for a company, newest first

schema.title: Response Get Company Reviews Api Companies  Company Id  Reviews Get

post.summary: Submit a review for a company (tourist accounts only, once per company)

put.summary: Update a review — owner or admin only

delete.summary: Delete a review — owner or admin only

get.summary: get review_id of user x on company y
List all users with optional search and filters (admin only)

schema.title: Response List Users Api Admin Users Get

get.summary: Get full details for a single user (admin only)

delete.summary: Permanently delete a user — cannot delete yourself (admin only)

put.summary: Activate or deactivate a user account (admin only)

get.summary: List all countries including total program counts (admin only)

schema.title: Response Admin List Countries Api Admin Countries Get

delete.summary: Delete a country and all its programs (admin only)

post.summary: Upload or replace the image for a country card (admin only)

get.summary: List all programs (active and inactive) with full filtering (admin only)

schema.title: Response Admin List Programs Api Admin Programs Get

delete.summary: Force-delete any program regardless of owner (admin only)

get.summary: List all company profiles (admin only)

schema.title: Response Admin List Companies Api Admin Companies Get

get.summary: Get platform-wide counts for the admin dashboard (admin only)
Serve an uploaded file by its stored path
Health check
